context7._comment: Context7 — Up-to-date library docs for LLMs. Remote HTTP, no API key needed for free tier.

codegraphcontext._comment: CodeGraphContext — Codebase graph analysis. Local stdio via pip-installed cgc.

arifos._comment: arifOS MCP kernel — internal Docker service on the OpenClaw network.

geox._comment: GEOX — Earth Intelligence (subsurface, seismic, well analysis). Governed by arifOS F1-F13. Risk tier: C2+ tools require arifOS SEAL.

wealth-organ._comment: WEALTH — Capital Intelligence (NPV, IRR, entropy, inequality). Governed by arifOS F1-F13. Risk tier: C2+ tools require arifOS SEAL.

well._comment: WELL — Biological Substrate (vitality, dignity, gradient). Governed by arifOS F1-F13. Risk tier: C1+ tools receive arifOS advisory.
